name: riftseer
title: Riftseer — Riftbound Card Search
description: Search Riftbound TCG cards via the Riftseer API.
author: amory

commands.name: search-cards
commands.title: Search Cards
commands.subtitle: Riftseer
commands.description: Search for Riftbound TCG cards by name.

commands.name: random-card
commands.title: Random Card
commands.subtitle: Riftseer
commands.description: Fetch a random Riftbound TCG card.

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL of the Riftseer API server (where /api/v1 routes live).

preferences.name: siteBaseUrl
preferences.title: Site Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL of the Riftseer frontend (used for card links).

preferences.name: maxRecentHistory
preferences.title: Max Recent History
preferences.description: How many recently viewed cards to remember and show when the search is empty. Use 0 to disable.
